Home.title: World Cup 2026 Predictions
Home.description: Join the biggest World Cup prediction pool!

Rules.title: Rules and How it Works
Rules.subtitle: Understand how the World Cup pool works
Rules.scoringDesc: You earn points for each match based on the accuracy of your prediction:
Rules.deadlineDesc: To ensure fairness, predictions for each match are locked exactly 15 minutes before kick-off. After this time, no changes can be saved, and your active prediction will be used for scoring.
Rules.mechanicsDesc: The pool follows the real structure of the 2026 World Cup. Initially, only Group Stage matches are available to predict. Once this stage concludes and the real qualified teams are determined, the system will automatically unlock the Round of 32 matches, followed by the Round of 16, and so on.
Rules.leaguesDesc: You can join up to 3 private leagues to compete with friends, but you can only create (be Admin of) 1 league. In case of a points tie in the ranking, tiebreakers are: most exact scores, most correct winners, and finally, alphabetical order of the nickname.
Rules.simulatorDesc: The Simulator is a sandbox area for you to play with mathematical possibilities. Scores entered in the simulator do not affect your official predictions saved in the database. There you can project the entire group stage to see which teams would qualify and how the knockout bracket would look based on your scores.

Auth.recaptchaNotReady: ReCaptcha is not ready. Reload the page.
Auth.nicknameInUse: This nickname is already in use. Choose another.

Simulator.title: World Cup 2026 Simulator
Simulator.subtitle: Simulate the results and see how the standings react. This DOES NOT affect your real predictions.
Simulator.knockoutEmpty: Fill in more results in the group stage to generate the qualified teams and the bracket.

Predictions.title: My Predictions
Predictions.subtitle: Make your predictions for the matches below. You have up to 15 minutes before each match to edit.

Ranking.title: Global Ranking
Ranking.subtitle: See who the best predictors are in the World Cup pool.
